faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

placements.overview:
N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) was founded in 1998. It is a private institute and is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) courses are offered to students at the PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) offers a total of 3 courses in stream such as Business & Management Studies. Some of the popular course offered at the institute is MBA/PGDM and the total seat intake for the available courses is 420. This course is offered to students across several specialisation such as Finance. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 2,82,240. Apart from this, the N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) is an institute which offers various courses at PG level. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the PG level, students can choose the available programmes such as MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the N R Institute of Business Management (NRIBM) programmes is around INR 2,82,240.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The placement process is going on, so the percentage of placed students cant be known. I don't know the salary packages as the placements are going-on. Till now HDFC Home Loan, S&P GLOBAL, Home First, ITC and others visited the campus. Top roles offered are data researcher and credit appraiser. Almost 100% of students got an internship in companies like ITC, TCS, Axis Bank, TOI, Tip Sons, and Gcmmf Ltd.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained with projectors, Wi-Fi, speakers and air-conditioners. Labs are even well maintained with laptops and have Wi-Fi connections. The library does provide books and journals in particular subjects and also provide newspapers and business magazines.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: All good things under one roof.

review_content.Placements: The placements of my senior batch were good. The college gives 100% placements as promised. The highest package was 10 Lacs and the average package is 4 to 5 Lacs for both Finance and Marketing. The companies visiting the campus every year are Asian Paints, Berger, Torrent Power, ITC, Coca Cola, Colgate and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has high technology supported computer labs, multi-purpose, air-conditioned auditorium, a library having many books, all newspapers, and magazines, journals, the material of previous batch students' studies and researches. The classrooms have proper seating capacity and arrangements, air-conditioned, projectors with audio-visual facilities, etc. In addition to this, recently the college has owned a girls hostel for the girl students of other cities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of N R Institute of Business Management.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college were okay. It could have been better with a good salary range. But I chose my field different and never opted for campus placement. Students can find good jobs on their own. Many companies visited our campus for placements, but all were good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was pathetic. Washrooms were bad. Classrooms were huge. The quality of food served in the canteen was okay. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Facilities in rooms and labs were okay. It's just one building college. Can expand well like other colleges. Extracurricular activities were not very given much attention.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty members and campus.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are good enough. The highest salary offered was 4 LPA, the lowest was 2 LPA, and the average was 3 LPA. Companies like Axis Bank, Kotak Bank, Asian Paints, Aditya Birla Capital, IDBI, HR Consultancies, and much more visited the college for placements. Approximately 95% of the students got the internships from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and campus are very good. Library, sports grounds, and A/C classrooms are available. The canteen is also good, and the food available in the canteen is average. Washrooms are not that good and clean. Parking facility is also very good. A good auditorium with 250 seats and a green room is also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018

review_content.Placements: Placements are good not 100%. If you work hard you will get placement for sure. For seniors & us placement were awesome. Mock papers were provided by placement officer. I would say for marketing it's very good & number of companies are most for marketing in NRIBM. Asian paints, itc, everest, godrej, axis, ICICI, Hdfc etc. Are the good companies were students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi available 24*7 hours. Library is awesome but not available for 24*7 hours. Sports culture is nice & you will get crowd for that too for sure. Medical facilities available if anyone gets any injuries. Big tournaments twice a year & there will be many short activities too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for pursuing any degree.

individual_reviews.title: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.

content.Placements: Placements in Ayurveda differ from technical fields, so the university ensures solid clinical training during the internship year. Many students start their own practice, prepare for MD/MS (Ayurveda), or go into wellness sectors. The hospital and OPD experience here builds strong diagnostic and patient handling skills. This foundation is essential for future growth as an Ayurvedic practitioner or entrepreneur.
content.Infrastructure: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. The mess food is simple and nutritious and the peaceful hill setting truly enhances focus.

paragraphs: Theadmission procedure for Abhilashi Universityhas multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, applying, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission have to clear all of the admission eligibility before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find here the detailedAbhilashi University admissions process:
Step 1: Abhilashi University Application Process 2025

Abhilashi University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Abhilashi University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Abhilashi University is entrance and merit-based, depending on the course. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as AUCET PG, NEET for the selection of respective classes. Admission to the BA programme at the university is merit-based
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount ofAbhilashi University feeto secure their seats.

faqs.question: What is the starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: The starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University usually range from INR 5 to 30 LPA as per the chosen MBA specialization. Finance, marketing, general management, business analytics, and entrepreneurship are among the top MBA specialisations that frequently yield the greatest pay after graduation. The highest-paying positions in India after an MBA range from INR 5 to 30 LPA. For the fresher of just within a year in the industry, the median salary range stands at INR 302,326 per annum . On the other hand, with more experience of between 5-9 years, the median salary per annum is about INR 719,315 per annum . With other experience levels, you stand to earn more with position attained in the company and the status of the particular company too playing a part. Top 10 companies hiring after the course. There are a whole lot of places to work as an MBA holder. Virtually all sectors will one time or the other place adverts for vacancies. Some of them in the top 10 are: Aditya Birla Group HCL technologies JPMorgan Chase New Gen Software IEEE corporate National Textile Corporation Ltd. Amazon seller Services Pvt. Ltd. Cisco Systems, Inc. Global Eagle Entertainment India Infrastructure Finance Company Ltd.

library.description: Abhilashi University has a fully equipped library which runs on automated software. It is housed in its own building and located centrally in the campus. It feeds all types of readers by getting issued the books whereas journals, magazines and copies of the articles are for consultation in the library. The University library is equipped with the text books, reference books and research journals of di?erent subjects. Access to online journals is through INFLIBNET and DELNET. Working hours of the library are from 10 am to 6 pm on every working day, except Sundays and national holidays. All the students, employees and authorities of the University are the members of the library.

reviews.review_heading: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. ...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Labs contain enough equipment for us. Libraries also provide almost every book that is needed related to our subjects. 
There is a cafeteria inside the campus that provides good food.
Hostels are also good but I do not live in hostel so don't know much about it.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the study environment, infrastructure, and climate of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a good and beautiful environment. Digital classrooms are available with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good and are now restructured with more cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It serves good food three times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Heaven for those who love study and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are free compact classrooms are clean and medical facility also available. There are lots of sports, festivals all these are available at the campus and also have a canteen facility, and all hostels rooms are well- designed with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is very peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are decent. Hostels are very good. Classrooms are spacious. There is a decent library in this college. Modern facilities are not available such as KFC, Domino's, etc. Laboratory technician and helper positions are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are not qualified, good placements for all the students, infrastructure was good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well maintained there. All the important items were present. Wi-Fi facilities were not available there. There was a well-maintained Library where all books were available. Labs were properly maintained and all the chemicals were available there.

reviews.review_heading: Agriculture is the best course for this era.
reviews.review_text: Quality food should be given in our institute and the quality of games should also be improved. WiFi is available for the students and labs are also updated. All the needful facilities are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Abhilashi University is a good university.
reviews.review_text: Everything on the campus was good, and we had many facilities like a library and a huge ground. The food served in the canteen was tasty and good for health. Everything on the campus was very good. Wi-Fi was the only thing which was not provided. But it is essential to learn things.

admission_process.title: SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone Admission process 2025

paragraphs: SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admissionto courses is entrance-based. Candidates willing to secure admission at SAGE University are required to meet the minimum eligibility and criteria and then appear in the selection process determined by the University. Candidates who perform well in all the selection rounds are allotted seats atSAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone.

SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone offersthree courses at UG and PG levelsin the field ofManagementandTechnologyand they are approved by AICTE. SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission is entirely based on candidates' past academic merit and performance inSunstone Screening ( Test & Interview). However, for admission to MBA, a valid score of either CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ ATMA entrance exam is accepted.

Candidates seeking admission to SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone are required to meet the eligibility criteria before applying to their desired course. Check below the course-wise details for SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone course admission 2025:
Download:SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone Brochure 2025

The SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission process is a three-step process that begins with the release of application forms on the official website of the university and ends with the payment of the admission confirmation fee by the candidates. Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria refer to the detailed SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission process below:
Step 1: Application Process
Candidates need to apply on the official website of Sunstone at(sunstone.in/campuses/sage-bhopal) for the preferred course.
Step 2: Selection process

Applicants are required to appear for the aptitude test conducted by SAGE University to shortlist candidates for the next round. Candidates applying to the MBA course can also appear forCAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ ATMAinstead of the aptitude test. In the next round, shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview.
Step 3:Admission offer
Candidates who perform well in both rounds are required to appear for the document verification. Based on the authenticity of their documents, applicants are selected and allotment of seats is done.

paragraphs: SAGE University Bhopal powered by Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) gives students access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities , or they can get a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements don’t fulfill the promise. To qualify for POP, students need to keep a minimum average attendance of 70% in all their credit and non-credit classes each semester. They also have to pass all exams with at least an 80% score or the equivalent CGPA, and they shouldn’t have any backlogs. Moreover, students must make sure that all fee payments are done according to the schedule mentioned in the offer letter. Finally, students are expected to follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.

As per the latest report, the University hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters during the 2025 placements. More than 150 job profiles were offered. The highest package offered during SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA , and the average package stood at INR 4.60 LPA .

The placement team of SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone keeps track of the dynamic changes taking place across the globe to ensure success with Sunstone’s placement-centric sessions, such as comprehensive interview preparation. The course curriculum of courses like MBA , BBA , and BTech includes an 8-month internship project that helps students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. Alongside this, 100% of scholarship opportunities are offered to the students.

review_summary.college_name: GM University Davangere Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MECHANICAL ENGINEERING - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, poor experience.

content.Placements: Only IT companies visited, and just 2 companies visited for mechanical/civil. Students were placed in rural companies that were unstable and treated engineering graduates like ITI or Diploma workers. Most of the companies had an understanding with the college, hiring students for the sake of numbers and never really releasing the offer letters. For the ones that did, they fired the students after 3 months. The students were not allowed to choose an internship of their liking in a field they wanted to pursue and had to pursue their internship by paying a fee.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not at all a good college for placements and fake marketing.

content.Placements: Roughly 20-30 students are placed, and the college people put fake placement numbers. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. 5% of students got internships in Bosch and KodNest. Role offered is software developer. From 1000 final year students only less than 50 students got placed. It is a worst college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good having unlimited Wi-Fi, a good library, and the canteens are good but the mess is bad. There is no preference for sports, only study, and they charge us money for every small thing. Hostel is good with three-sharing and two-sharing rooms with attached bathrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and a nice campus.

content.Placements: 100% of students pass out this year. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The course includes business, account management, company economics, management, and Indian banking services.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very wide range, with a capacity of 70 to 80 students. Labs are available, and Wi-Fi is throughout the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and know their subjects well. Most of them teach clearly and support students when needed. The course is useful and covers important topics. It helps students learn theoretical and practical skills needed for jobs, but doing extra practice or internships is also important. Our college faculty is very friendly, incredible, and highly experienced.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall college is good with faculty members.

content.Placements: Top recruiters for civil engineering Larsen and Toubro, Tata Projects, etc. Almost 50% of students got placed. The salary package offered is 3.6 LPA. Top roles offered are site engineering, design engineering, quality engineering, and water resources engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The college has quality Wi-Fi and labs for students. Classes have quality teaching screenboards. The college has a digital library. This college has a separate hostel for boys and girls on the campus with security, a canteen, sports, and games have good quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has the best infrastructure in Davanagere.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students in our course get placed in jobs. The average salary package is about 3 lakhs per year, while top companies like Infosys, Wipro, and PayPal offer salaries of around 34 lakhs for IAS roles. About 60% of our students also secure internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college for Wi-Fi and lab is pretty good. We have quite an impressive library which is large enough for 200 students to be seated in. The hostel facility and food facilities are quite good. The importance of sports is also better.

admission_overview.college_name: GM University Davangere Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: GM University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university considers national or state-level entrance exams such as GATE, PGCET, etc. for admission to specific programmes.GM UniversityconductsGMUSETfor admission to various courses. The university offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through various faculties. The courses are available across various streams such as Commerce & Management, Computing & IT, Engineering, etc. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
GM University offers full-time courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university opens application online for all the programmes. Below are the key highlights forGM University admissions:

Currently, the applications are open at GM University. Candidates have to first apply for the preferred course to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
Step 1: GM University Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply online for the preferred programme by providing course and college preferences. Candidates need to pay an application fee to register for a programme. Once the candidate fills the form, a counsellor contacts him for further process.
Step 2: Selection

GM University evaluates the applications of the candidates. The university considers entrance exams such as KCET, Karnataka PGCET, GATE, etc. for admission to BTech, MBA, MCA and other courses. The university also conducts GMUSET for admission to MBA, BCom LLB, BA LLB, LLB and DPharm courses.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The university releases a selection list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Further, candidates need to pay theGM University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Vanguard.
reviews.review_text: Vanguard has got a very good infrastructure in terms of building and other criteria. Library and canteen are the good places to hang around in leisure time. If you are a reader then our library has got you. It has a good collection of different genre books.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vanguard Business School.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities required for balanced modern learning, like Wi-Fi, library, and canteen, are available on campus. All the classrooms are equipped with the latest projectors and sound systems for presentation by professors and students. The hostel stay is at Co-live, which is just 500 meters away from college. All the facilities like shared kitchen, washing machines and Wi-Fi are available.

reviews.review_heading: I had the worst experience at this college. It is not worthy and gives fake promises.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is moderate, and there is no hostel. The canteen looks like a roadside shop, and there is no ground to play sports. Our college promises that it provides admission in MBA, but next, it will force you to take admission in PGDM. So, it is a waste of money. I suggest you to prefer a good college which has ethical values. I have suffered a lot in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B-school in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-furnished air-conditioned classrooms. Parking facilities are also available for bikes and cars. The college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility and canteen facilities. There is frequent government bus facility for the college from all over the place, so it is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with our college as it has good teachers and very good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility, well-equipped classrooms with air-conditioners, projector and screen. The library is provided with day to day updated magazines. Our college has a homely canteen and indoor stadium where table tennis, carrom, etc., are available. Hostel facilities include 24x7 Wi-Fi facility, hot water, homely and quality food and laundry service.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vanguard Business School.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are advanced. We have a wonderful library which is open for 24x7. The menu we get is a mixture of both north and south. The hostel has a mini gym and a projector, and they will organise events on all Sunday. You can come to college at any time on Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vanguard Business School.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not huge, but it has all the facilities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and speakers. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is 24x7 open for students. Quality of facilities available in the hostel is good, and it takes 5 minutes to reach college from the hostel. The hostel has facilities like a gym, small theatre, lift and hot water is also available all the time. The quality of the food served is good. The college arranges outbound activities 2 times in a year for one ...

reviews.review_heading: Vanguard a great learning centre for the Management Education.
reviews.review_text: In terms of Infrastructure Vanguard has all the facilities for the students like A.C classroom, Conference room, Library, canteen, well-furnished hostel, medical facilities, etc. Indoor sports facilities also available like table tennis, carrom. Badminton etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because the college provides 100% placement.
reviews.review_text: We can access the college facilities for 24 hours. There are a library and the canteen in the college. Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours. For sports and games, we have to book outside stadiums. The college building has all the facilities except ground and huge space.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty management. Placements are above average until 2019.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is small. Classrooms are equipped with smart equipment. The Wi-Fi is good with high-speed. The library is equipped with all useful resources and offers productive environment. The quality of accommodation is very impressive,  and the electricity is available 24x7. The food is not adequate, but we can manage. The college is not having any field, and we play indoor activities like table tennis, carrom, monopoly. There is the facility department to take care of med...

reviews.review_heading: Vanguard Business School is a student-driven college and creates front line managers.
reviews.review_text: Faculty and infrastructure of our college are awesome, and the faculty members have well knowledge regarding their particular subjects. The infrastructure of our college is not so huge, but what student needs a good faculty and a good placement, and all things are provided here. Library of our college is awesome with a collection of book, and decent canteen is also available on our campus. Canteen is open for 24 hours, and it is huge and spacious, and mess facility is also available in the cante...

reviews.review_heading: The only college with 100% ROI.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi enabled campus and our library has a vast collection of books which includes all verticals i.e Finance, Marketing, HR and operations. The classes are well-equipped with AC'S electronic teaching equipment (Projector) and a computer lab which accommodates 60 students.

reviews.review_heading: Vanguard Business School is a college with good return on investment if you are focused.
reviews.review_text: The campus has only one building with multiple classrooms, a lab, library and Wi-Fi facility. There's no hostel facility. Since the campus is very small, no sports activities can be conducted. It requires a separate area outside the campus to conduct sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: 'Creating Front-line Managers', the tagline suits the college. It makes the students industry ready.
reviews.review_text: All the basic amenities are available in the campus. Facilities like Wi-Fi, a sufficient number of classrooms and a library are available. An IT lab is available for the students to access computers and the internet. All the classrooms have a sufficient amount of lighting and are air-conditioned. Projectors and speakers are also available in all classrooms. All the facilities are accommodated in one building. There is a canteen where all the basic and required eatables are available. Both vegeta...

reviews.review_heading: Good ROI for the MBA programme when compared with similar kind of colleges.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were newly built and had a high-speed Wi-Fi facility. We had IT labs and library as well to finish assignments if there was any issue at the hostel. The hostel rooms were good, and the food was okay to have. The library and lab could accomodate a maximum of 40 to 50 students at a time.

overview_faqs.question: Is Chandravati Group of Institutions (C.G.I, Bharatpur) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Chandravati Group of Institutions (C.G.I, Bharatpur) is a reputed institute for MCA, M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM, BHMCT, UG Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Hospitality & Travel. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Chandravati Group of Institutions (C.G.I, Bharatpur) has a review rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 2.8 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Chandravati Group of Institutions (C.G.I, Bharatpur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Placements were good in 2016 and above 40 students were placed.

content.Placements: Above 30% of students got placed in each core engineering department. In this college, the highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered was around 8 LPA. Top multinational companies like Infosys, Piramal, Lava, and other companies recruited students.
content.Infrastructure: There were around 25 classrooms and labs in our college. There was one library in this college. There were Wi-Fi facilities available. There were available facilities in our hostel. The quality of food is much better than in other government colleges. There were facilities for games and sports. Medical facilities were also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Polytechnic - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for day scholars.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placement opportunities for branches like mechanical and civil. I have completed my diploma, but I didn't get placed. The polytechnic course is offered in only three departments namely civil, mechanical, and electrical.
content.Infrastructure: The building in the college is quite good as compared to other colleges in the city. The furniture in the classrooms is good. Playgrounds are available to conduct sports activities that are organised here.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of the college are average as some faculty members have quite good skills. But some of the faculty members are below average, considering their positions. Overall, the faculty section is not good in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This is an average college.

content.Placements: The college provides placement opportunities only for the students of the CS department, but not for the core branches like mechanical and civil. The faculty members are not good concerning the course. Some of the teachers are good, but they need to hire many good faculty members.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The building is not that big, but it is good for academics. The campus is not fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the college provides Wi-Fi facility only in one building. Some labs are good, but some labs don't have the required equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with all the facilities.

content.Placements: Lots of students got placed in various companies. A lot of companies visit the college campus. The salary package ranges from 5 LPA to 12 LPA. They offer highly appreciated roles to students. The placement ratio is good.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi service for students. Labs are very good. There are around 1 lakh books in the library. The medical facilities are available in campus and ambulance is also available. Sports facilities are really good. There is a playground for lots of sports like cricket, badminton, athletics, table tennis etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Try for NITs & IITs if you are good in the study or for good private universities. Best of luck.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. All pass out students take coaching classes for the government jobs like SSC, CGL, GATE, IES, Bank PO or some students join private companies or most of them at home. So, please don't take the admission in this college because it is good for you and your parents.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and not bad. The Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college, but the library has old books, and there are no standard good books. The classrooms are good, but there is no equipment or projectors for the digital studies. There are no medical facilities. No sports. The labs have all the equipment and machines but not in working conditions. There is no canteen in this college. The hostel rooms are average with double sharing.
